title: taraxacum reinthalii
intro: Taraxacum reinthalii, also known as the Alpine Dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its roots and leaves, which are rich in inulin, a type of fructan that acts as a prebiotic. The health benefits of Taraxacum reinthalii include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and supplements, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosage.
